content: Configure Exa API key + verify primary provider working
Backend: RBAC 5-role system + migrate owner to super_admin
Backend: Admin routes full rewrite (Users/Roles/Brands/Categories/Products CRUD)
Backend: Document Management System (upload/replace/delete/metadata/bulk/versions/enable-disable) + Emergent Object Storage
Backend: Search Logs (clear rights) + AI Logs + System Settings (pluggable LLM provider)
Frontend: Admin.js full rewrite with all new tabs
Frontend: Documents.js support for uploaded file URLs
Call testing_agent_v3 for full Phase B regression + new feature validation
Fix any bugs from testing agent report
